title: Liability
description: A debt or financial obligation. Includes mortgages, loans, credit cards, and cultural obligations (mahr, ketubah debt, lobola) that are priority debts in certain jurisdictions.

type.$comment: mahr = Islamic deferred bridal gift (priority debt). ketubah_debt = Jewish marriage contract obligation. lobola = African customary bride price. mezonot = Jewish widow's maintenance obligation.

creditor.description: Name of the creditor or institution

securedAgainst.description: Reference to a Property.id or Asset.id this liability is secured against
